## Summary

What changed?

## Safety and metadata impact

- [ ] No sensitive action is marked safe unless it is genuinely safe.
- [ ] Booking, payment, personal data, account changes, legal, medical, and destructive actions require confirmation.
- [ ] Generated metadata shapes remain documented.

- [ ] `pnpm test`
